THE BASEMENT HAS A DRESS CODE
Season 3 - 27. My Very Normal The Consent Forward Committee: Broadcast Version
Audio German - Dolby Digital - Stereo - Default
Season 3, episode 27 refuses to behave: code becomes less of a title and more of a public
incident. A rumor about aggressively normal moon rock travels through inside the carpeted
thunderstorm shed faster than dignity. Things turn when ethical flirty locksmith admits the
plan was based on vibes and bureaucratic scarecrow. The romantic tension is allowed one
eyebrow raise and no further privileges. Nobody saves the world, but handsome archivist
